name: sense
description: MCP server that gives AI coding agents structural understanding of your codebase — symbol graph, blast radius, semantic search, and auto-detected project conventions.
long_description:
Sense is a local-only MCP server for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, and any MCP client). It parses your codebase with tree-sitter, builds a symbol graph plus embeddings, and exposes four tools without sending anything to the cloud. Run `sense scan` in any project, then point your AI at the MCP server.

Measured across 7 real-world codebases (Discourse, Flask, Next.js, Axum, Gin, Javalin, and a private e-commerce repo), Claude Code with Sense uses 47% fewer tool calls and 32% fewer tokens at the same correctness as the baseline.

tools.name: sense_graph
tools.description: Symbol relationships — callers, callees, inheritance, tests, dead code

tools.name: sense_search
tools.description: Hybrid semantic + keyword search with text fallback

tools.name: sense_blast
tools.description: Blast radius, affected code, affected tests, risk score
